message:
feat(tests): expand integration test coverage with enrichment suites and deep property tests across engine subsystems

Adds ~10,500 lines of new integration tests across 14 modified and 6 new
test files:

New test suites:
- benchmark_freshness_gate_enrichment_integration
- frankenlab_bridge_contract_enrichment_integration
- optimized_metadata_substrate_enrichment_integration
- resource_certificate_consumer_enrichment_integration
- self_replacement_enrichment_integration
- trace_fusion_enrichment_integration

Major expansions to existing suites:
- alloc_domain_integration (+1200): comprehensive trait tests for
  AllocationDomain/LifetimeClass (Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Copy, Ord,
  serde round-trip), allocation lifecycle edge cases, budget overflow,
  fragmentation tracking, and OOM recovery
- catastrophe_witness_generator_integration (+1217): deep witness chain
  validation, timestamp monotonicity, severity classification, and
  multi-witness correlation
- hash_tiers_integration (+995): tier promotion/demotion invariants,
  hash collision handling, and cache eviction ordering
- native_addon_parity_gate_integration (+1514): parity matrix
  completeness, version compatibility, and regression detection
- proof_specialization_receipt_integration (+1466): receipt chain
  integrity, specialization dedup, and expiry semantics
- spectral_fleet_convergence_integration (+1286): convergence rate
  bounds, fleet partition healing, and spectral gap calculations
- structural_causal_model_integration (+1503): DAG acyclicity proofs,
  intervention calculus, and counterfactual consistency
- test_depth_gate_integration (+1156): depth limit enforcement,
  recursive gate nesting, and overflow protection

Smaller additions: frankenctl_cli (+104 lines for react example app
workflow), module_resolution_index (+44), rgc_cli_operator_workflow
(+27), revocation_enforcement (+4), support_surface_contract (+14)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
